description: This is a Java test class for the SupportingDocumentController within a Spring Boot application, specifically testing security and upload-related endpoints using MockMvc and Mockito.

classes.name: test_supporting_document_controller_webmvc_test
classes.description: A JUnit test class for testing the SupportingDocumentController endpoints in a Spring Boot context, focusing on security and file upload functionalities.

methods.name: stubJwt
methods.description: Mocks the JwtService to simulate parsing and validation of a JWT token, setting up claims with subject and roles.

methods.name: upload_withoutJwt_is401
methods.description: Tests that a POST request to upload a document without an Authorization header returns a 401 Unauthorized status.

methods.name: upload_withNonUuidSubject_is400
methods.description: Tests that a POST request with a JWT containing a non-UUID subject results in a 400 Bad Request with an appropriate error message.

methods.name: upload_withValidJwt_callsService
methods.description: Tests that a valid JWT with a UUID subject triggers the upload service and returns the expected response.
